The main reason we went here was for the dongpo pork dish. The meat was tender and well spiced and coupled with the soft boa bun, it just melted in your mouth. The mapo tofu was made with silken tofu and served with noodles. The taste of the sichuan pepper was really good and we couldn't stop eating it. The restaurant was really busy and we had to put our name on a list and waited about 30minutes to be seated. The dishes were a bit expensive however, I would order and eat it again as it was worth it.
